title: Introduction to GIS & Cartography
Advanced Spatial Analysis & Python
Web GIS: Leaflet & Mapbox GL
Remote Sensing & Earth Observation
description: Master core GIS concepts: spatial data models, projections, digitizing, and thematic mapping. Hands-on with QGIS and ArcGIS Online.
Geostatistics, raster processing, machine learning for spatial data, and automation with GeoPandas & ArcPy.
Build interactive web maps, integrate GeoJSON, vector tiles, and location-based apps. Modern front-end GIS development.
Sentinel, Landsat imagery analysis, vegetation indices, image classification using SNAP and Google Earth Engine.

courses.title: New GIS Course
courses.description: Describe the course content, learning objectives and tools.
